query:
UPDATE activity_spots 
SET 
  description = CASE 
    WHEN name = 'Kandooma Thila' THEN 'A submerged pinnacle known for its striking topography and fast currents. Kandooma is teeming with grey reef sharks, schools of snapper, and vibrant soft corals, making it one of the Maldives\' most photogenic dives. The site features excellent coral coverage and consistent marine life encounters.'
    WHEN name = 'Maaya Thila' THEN 'Best known as a night dive, Maaya Thila transforms at night to hunt sharks and jacks. Moray eels, lionfish, and octopus make regular appearances. This pinnacle dive is perfect for experiencing nocturnal marine behavior and unique predator-prey interactions in the darkness.'
    WHEN name = 'Kudarah Thila' THEN 'A marine protected area bursting with marine life and covered in soft corals. Barracuda, schools of blue-striped snappers, and white-tip sharks patrol the area. The site is known for its healthy ecosystem and dense fish populations, making it ideal for photographers and marine life enthusiasts.'
    WHEN name = 'Dhigurah Beyru' THEN 'This long stretch of outer reef is one of the best locations for spotting whale sharks, particularly during slack tide when they gather near the surface. The site features vibrant coral formations and excellent visibility for observing these gentle giants in their natural habitat.'
    WHEN name = 'Fotteyo Kandu' THEN 'Arguably one of the Maldives\' best channel dives, Fotteyo features swim-throughs, vibrant soft corals, and frequent sightings of grey reef and white-tip sharks. The site is only accessible in the dry season with the correct conditions and offers heart-pounding drift diving experiences.'
    WHEN name = 'Hanifaru Bay' THEN 'A UNESCO Biosphere Reserve world-famous for its seasonal aggregation of manta rays (June-November) and occasional whale shark encounters. Snorkeling only, but it remains one of the most unforgettable marine experiences in the world. The site is a protected marine area with strict conservation measures.'
    WHEN name = 'Dhonfanu Thila' THEN 'This deep pinnacle attracts dozens of mantas when currents bring in plankton. Macro lovers will also find ghost pipefish and leaf fish among the corals. The site offers excellent opportunities for both wide-angle and macro photography.'
    WHEN name = 'Kuredu Express' THEN 'One of the Maldives\' most exhilarating drift dives featuring powerful currents that bring in grey reef sharks, giant trevally, and barracuda. This high-adrenaline site requires experienced divers and offers thrilling encounters with large pelagic species.'
    WHEN name = 'Miyaru Kandu' THEN 'A fast-paced drift dive known for reliable sightings of grey reef sharks, whitetips, tuna, and schooling barracuda. Strong currents and excellent visibility make it a favorite for experienced divers chasing big action and pelagic encounters.'
    WHEN name = 'Mulaku Kandu' THEN 'Known for strong currents and crystal-clear visibility, this channel dive is home to schools of barracuda, tuna, and reef sharks. It\'s an action-packed site offering consistent encounters with large marine species and excellent diving conditions.'
    WHEN name = 'British Loyalty Wreck' THEN 'This massive WWII wreck lies between 18-33 meters and is one of the best wreck dives in the Maldives. It\'s encrusted with coral and teems with groupers, lionfish, and batfish. The wreck provides a unique historical and marine biology experience.'
    WHEN name = 'Addu Kandu' THEN 'With visibility often exceeding 30 meters, divers can see grey reef sharks, napoleon wrasse, and barracuda. Currents can be strong, making for an exhilarating drift dive with consistent encounters with large reef sharks and pelagic species.'
    WHEN name = 'Villingili Kandu' THEN 'This remote channel dive is shark central where grey reef, white-tip, and occasional hammerhead sharks can be found cruising in strong currents. The site offers thrilling encounters with multiple shark species in a pristine, less-visited location.'
    WHEN name = 'Tiger Zoo' THEN 'Unique pelagic species site, especially tiger sharks which are frequently seen. Other rare sightings include oceanic mantas, thresher sharks, hammerheads, and even mola mola. This is a premier site for advanced divers seeking rare species encounters.'
    ELSE description
  END,
  maxDepth = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Kandooma Thila' THEN 35
    WHEN name = 'Maaya Thila' THEN 30
    WHEN name = 'Kudarah Thila' THEN 30
    WHEN name = 'Dhigurah Beyru' THEN 25
    WHEN name = 'Fotteyo Kandu' THEN 40
    WHEN name = 'Hanifaru Bay' THEN 12
    WHEN name = 'Dhonfanu Thila' THEN 35
    WHEN name = 'Kuredu Express' THEN 40
    WHEN name = 'Miyaru Kandu' THEN 35
    WHEN name = 'Mulaku Kandu' THEN 40
    WHEN name = 'British Loyalty Wreck' THEN 33
    WHEN name = 'Addu Kandu' THEN 35
    WHEN name = 'Villingili Kandu' THEN 40
    WHEN name = 'Tiger Zoo' THEN 40
    ELSE maxDepth
  END,
  minDepth = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Kandooma Thila' THEN 5
    WHEN name = 'Maaya Thila' THEN 10
    WHEN name = 'Kudarah Thila' THEN 5
    WHEN name = 'Dhigurah Beyru' THEN 3
    WHEN name = 'Fotteyo Kandu' THEN 10
    WHEN name = 'Hanifaru Bay' THEN 1
    WHEN name = 'Dhonfanu Thila' THEN 8
    WHEN name = 'Kuredu Express' THEN 5
    WHEN name = 'Miyaru Kandu' THEN 5
    WHEN name = 'Mulaku Kandu' THEN 5
    WHEN name = 'British Loyalty Wreck' THEN 18
    WHEN name = 'Addu Kandu' THEN 5
    WHEN name = 'Villingili Kandu' THEN 5
    WHEN name = 'Tiger Zoo' THEN 10
    ELSE minDepth
  END,
  difficulty = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Kandooma Thila' THEN 'intermediate'
    WHEN name = 'Maaya Thila' THEN 'advanced'
    WHEN name = 'Kudarah Thila' THEN 'intermediate'
    WHEN name = 'Dhigurah Beyru' THEN 'beginner'
    WHEN name = 'Fotteyo Kandu' THEN 'advanced'
    WHEN name = 'Hanifaru Bay' THEN 'beginner'
    WHEN name = 'Dhonfanu Thila' THEN 'intermediate'
    WHEN name = 'Kuredu Express' THEN 'advanced'
    WHEN name = 'Miyaru Kandu' THEN 'advanced'
    WHEN name = 'Mulaku Kandu' THEN 'advanced'
    WHEN name = 'British Loyalty Wreck' THEN 'intermediate'
    WHEN name = 'Addu Kandu' THEN 'advanced'
    WHEN name = 'Villingili Kandu' THEN 'advanced'
    WHEN name = 'Tiger Zoo' THEN 'advanced'
    ELSE difficulty
  END,
  marineLife = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Kandooma Thila' THEN '["Grey reef sharks", "Schools of snapper", "Soft corals", "Jacks", "Groupers"]'
    WHEN name = 'Maaya Thila' THEN '["Sharks", "Jacks", "Moray eels", "Lionfish", "Octopus", "Nocturnal predators"]'
    WHEN name = 'Kudarah Thila' THEN '["Barracuda", "Blue-striped snappers", "White-tip sharks", "Soft corals", "Fusiliers"]'
    WHEN name = 'Dhigurah Beyru' THEN '["Whale sharks", "Reef sharks", "Trevally", "Snappers", "Coral formations"]'
    WHEN name = 'Fotteyo Kandu' THEN '["Grey reef sharks", "White-tip sharks", "Soft corals", "Trevally", "Barracuda"]'
    WHEN name = 'Hanifaru Bay' THEN '["Manta rays", "Whale sharks", "Reef fish", "Coral polyps", "Plankton feeders"]'
    WHEN name = 'Dhonfanu Thila' THEN '["Manta rays", "Ghost pipefish", "Leaf fish", "Soft corals", "Reef sharks"]'
    WHEN name = 'Kuredu Express' THEN '["Grey reef sharks", "Giant trevally", "Barracuda", "Jacks", "Pelagic species"]'
    WHEN name = 'Miyaru Kandu' THEN '["Grey reef sharks", "White-tip sharks", "Tuna", "Barracuda schools", "Jacks"]'
    WHEN name = 'Mulaku Kandu' THEN '["Barracuda schools", "Tuna", "Reef sharks", "Jacks", "Groupers"]'
    WHEN name = 'British Loyalty Wreck' THEN '["Groupers", "Lionfish", "Batfish", "Corals", "Reef sharks"]'
    WHEN name = 'Addu Kandu' THEN '["Grey reef sharks", "Napoleon wrasse", "Barracuda", "Jacks", "Trevally"]'
    WHEN name = 'Villingili Kandu' THEN '["Grey reef sharks", "White-tip sharks", "Hammerheads", "Jacks", "Pelagic species"]'
    WHEN name = 'Tiger Zoo' THEN '["Tiger sharks", "Oceanic mantas", "Thresher sharks", "Hammerheads", "Mola mola"]'
    ELSE marineLife
  END,
  bestSeason = CASE
    WHEN name IN ('Hanifaru Bay', 'Dhonfanu Thila', 'Kuredu Express') THEN 'June-November'
    WHEN name IN ('Fotteyo Kandu', 'Miyaru Kandu', 'Mulaku Kandu', 'Kuredu Express') THEN 'January-April'
    WHEN name IN ('Dhigurah Beyru', 'Tiger Zoo') THEN 'Year-round'
    ELSE bestSeason
  END,
  rating = CASE
    WHEN name IN ('Kandooma Thila', 'Kudarah Thila', 'Fotteyo Kandu', 'Hanifaru Bay', 'Kuredu Express') THEN '4.8'
    WHEN name IN ('Maaya Thila', 'Dhonfanu Thila', 'Miyaru Kandu', 'Mulaku Kandu', 'Addu Kandu') THEN '4.7'
    WHEN name IN ('Dhigurah Beyru', 'British Loyalty Wreck', 'Villingili Kandu', 'Tiger Zoo') THEN '4.6'
    ELSE rating
  END
WHERE spotType = 'dive_site' AND name IN ('Kandooma Thila', 'Maaya Thila', 'Kudarah Thila', 'Dhigurah Beyru', 'Fotteyo Kandu', 'Hanifaru Bay', 'Dhonfanu Thila', 'Kuredu Express', 'Miyaru Kandu', 'Mulaku Kandu', 'British Loyalty Wreck', 'Addu Kandu', 'Villingili Kandu', 'Tiger Zoo');
